mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_users(user_number, user_id, user_pw, user_name, user_age, user_gender) Values(seq_user.nextval, #{userId}, #{userPw}, #{userName}, #{userAge}, #{userGender})
mapper.select: SELECT user_id AS userId, user_name AS userName FROM tbl_users WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND user_pw = #{userPw}
